amplifyuibuilder.theme.CfnAbout: The AWS::AmplifyUIBuilder::Theme resource specifies a theme within an Amplify app. A theme is a collection of style settings that apply globally to the components associated with the app.

amplifyuibuilder.theme.Overrides.Description: Describes the properties that can be overriden to customize a theme.

amplifyuibuilder.theme.Tags.Description: One or more key-value pairs to use when tagging the theme.

amplifyuibuilder.theme.Values.Description: A list of key-value pairs that defines the properties of the theme.
